top_signals.title: Zelenskyy taps European allies to build Freya, a cheaper Patriot-alternative to Russia’s ballistic missiles
top_signals.summary: Ukraine will hold its first coalition meeting on a homegrown ballistic missile defense system in France “in the coming days.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches more strikes after Tehran declares Strait of Hormuz closed

top_signals.summary: Speech At the Financial Stability Board Virtual Outreach Event

top_signals.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
top_signals.summary: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
top_signals.summary: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
